description: Introduction to MEMS technology, devices and systems. Fundamentals of MEMS in fabrication, process integration, material mechanics of MEMS structures, sensors and actuators. Main topics in MEMS - microfluidics, optical MEMS, RF MEMS, BioMEMS, packaging, and CAD.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: (E C E 335or340), graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
